---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new component, prop, or improvement
title: 'feat: '
labels: enhancement
assignees: mureyvenom
---

## Type of request

- [ ] New component
- [ ] New prop on an existing component
- [ ] New utility function
- [ ] Improvement to an existing component
- [ ] API change
- [ ] Documentation improvement
- [ ] Other: \_\_\_

## The problem you're trying to solve

<!--
Describe the problem, not the solution.
"I need a card flip animation" is a solution.
"I cannot show CVV details on the PaymentCard without building my own component" is a problem.
-->

## The fintech use case

<!--
Where in a real app would this be used?
e.g. "On a card management screen where users can view their virtual debit card details"
-->

## Proposed solution

<!--
Describe what you'd like to see. If you're suggesting a new prop or component,
include a rough API sketch.
-->

```tsx
// Example of how you'd use it
<SomeComponent newProp="value" />
```

## Alternatives you've considered

What have you tried as a workaround? Why doesn't it meet your needs?

## Would you be willing to contribute this?

- [ ] Yes — I'd like to open a PR for this
- [ ] Maybe — I could contribute with some guidance
- [ ] No — I'm requesting it for someone else to build

## Additional context

Any other context, mockups, or references to similar implementations in other libraries.
